provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence in Science Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. It publishes 46 unique coded courses across the Major prerequisite, common required courses and four closed Track structures. Students follow one Track and complete every requirement specified for that Track. LIFS1901 remains in the Applied Biosciences Track but students with level 3 or above in HKDSE Biology are exempted from it. University Common Core and School requirements are outside this Programme-local supplement, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
